description: Retrieval regression baseline for the CI eval-gate. Dense E5 retrieval (run_eval.py) on the gold seed eval set over the published corpus. A pull request fails when a guarded metric drops more than its tolerance below the baseline. Regenerate these numbers deliberately whenever an intended change (e.g. corpus expansion or an embedding swap) moves them: run scripts/run_eval.py on the gold set and update the baselines below.
